The fog rolled in three mornings straight and would not lift until past noon
A dry spell settled over the area and the wells have been dropping fast
The wind changed direction twice in one afternoon and has not settled since
There was a ring around the moon last night that the old timers say means a bad storm is coming
The rain came down sideways for a full day and flooded the lower paths
It has not rained in so long that the cisterns are nearly empty and people are starting to ration
The sky turned a strange yellow color before the last storm and the air went completely still
Frost came early this year and caught half the settlement off guard with crops still in the ground
The thunder rolled on for hours without a single drop of rain falling anywhere nearby
A warm spell in the middle of the cold season melted the ice off the walls and flooded the cellars
The clouds have sat low over the ridge for days and everything stays damp no matter what you do
Hail the size of river stones came down without warning and cracked the shutters on three buildings
